description: Topic clusters for marketing default blog posts served from static fallback (src/content/blog-static-posts.ts). Database-published posts are not listed here; run a slug export from production to extend this map.

clusters.name: Prioritization & clinical judgment
clusters.pillarTitle: Clinical judgment on exam day: turning cues into safe decisions

clusters.name: Pharmacology & medication safety
clusters.pillarTitle: Pharmacology study that sticks (without memorization chaos)

clusters.name: Med-surg: renal function, labs & fluids
clusters.pillarTitle: Lab trends that matter in acute kidney injury

notes: Electrolytes, OB, peds, mental health, and country-specific migration clusters are represented in regional SEO sources (e.g. src/lib/seo/blog-topic-clusters.ts, long-form posts) and in the database; this file covers only the three canonical /blog/* static fallbacks in-repo.
